phases: Phase 2: SDK core + qor-logic compliance enforce
ci_commands: python -m pytest tests/test_compliance_matrix_loader.py tests/test_compliance_enforce.py tests/test_compliance_conformance.py tests/test_package_data_ships_matrix.py -q

limitations: V1 generic runners only for the 4 context-free gates; prompt-injection tagged ci (needs --files)
SDK runs a control via runner.module.entry(args); no-runner controls skipped for runnable points
non_goals: no hook installer/pack; trigger wiring downstream-owned
no change to any gate behavior
